title: cakile maritima var. littoralis
intro: Cakile maritima var. littoralis, also known as sea rocket or littoral sea rocket, is a plant species within the family Brassicaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a demulcent, soothing and protecting mucous membranes, and as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Cakile maritima var. littoralis include its potential to alleviate inflammation, reduce fever, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Cakile maritima var. littoralis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
